name: Bleeding
description: Open wounds that worsen every Clock. Untreated bleeding opens the door to poison and infection (rulebook, Damage Types).

bleed_out_drain._note: Systemic bleed-out (F2 rework, owner ruling 2026-07-19): once a part is bleeding out to a lethal degree (tier >= from_tier), the body loses hp_per_tier*tier HP each Clock from every OTHER part that can bleed (not bleed_immune, not still hidden behind surface immunity, not already destroyed). Death is not a tier effect — the drain routes through the normal vital-part-destroyed rule, so the show only ends when a LETHAL part empties. Numbers PLACEHOLDER (R14) — tune drain feel in playtest.

tiers.name: Open Wound
tiers.description: Bleeding established; vulnerable to poison/infection entry.

tiers.name: Heavy Bleed
tiers.description: Forced Action - Body on actions with this part; Shock Tier 1.

tiers.name: Part Death
tiers.description: The part dies off — lethal on torso or head; all actions are Forced Action - Body.

tiers.name: Bled Out
tiers.description: Maximum blood loss. No instant kill on its own part (F2 rework) — the systemic bleed_out_drain empties the body each Clock, and death comes only when a LETHAL part is drained to zero.

name: Crushed
description: Structural trauma. Breaks, shatters, then destroys. Tiers 3-4 added by rules-addendum R4 (book stopped at 2).

tiers.name: Break
tiers.description: Forced Action - Body on actions using this part.

tiers.name: Shatter
tiers.description: Limbs: part disabled. Torso: internal trauma. Head: lethal if targetable.

tiers.name: Destroyed
tiers.description: Part destroyed — lethal on torso/head, permanent loss on limbs (addendum R4).

tiers.name: Death
tiers.description: Crushed beyond recovery — lethal on torso/head only (R4). A limb caps at destroyed (permanent loss), never death; only a lethal part can be killed by crushing (F2 fix).

name: Suffocation
description: Torso only; ignores limb HP. A death timer, not a tiered condition. Items referencing 'Suffocation Tier 1' read as 'delay 1 Clock' (addendum R4).

name: Chilled
description: Cold seizing a specific part. No HP damage. Resolves at Clock reset if not re-applied during the Clock (addendum R4/E2).

tiers.name: Numb
tiers.description: Resolves at next Clock reset without re-application.

tiers.name: Seizing
tiers.description: Forced Action - Body on actions using this part.

tiers.name: Frozen
tiers.description: Part disabled; on the head, incapacitating.

name: Exhausted
description: Whole-body fatigue. Tier numbers are rules-addendum R4 PROVISIONAL (book had no tiers). Recovers one tier per Clock spent taking no scheduled actions.

tiers.name: Winded
tiers.description: +1 Moment cost on actions costing 2 or more.

tiers.name: Drained
tiers.description: +1 Moment cost on all actions; Exposure occurs on body hits.

tiers.name: Spent
tiers.description: Every action is a Forced Action - Body.

name: Infected
description: Whole-body sepsis. Prevents healing, accelerates everything else, then starts killing (T3 timer per addendum R4).

tiers.name: Festering
tiers.description: Prevents healing and resolution of other conditions.

tiers.name: Septic
tiers.description: All other active conditions advance one extra tier at Clock reset.

tiers.name: Terminal
tiers.description: Starts a 2-Clock death timer.

name: Burn
description: Fire damage to a specific part. Cauterizes (stops Bleeding, removes Chill) but costs Shock (addendum R4 closes the free-cure exploit).

tiers.name: Seared
tiers.description: Stops Bleeding and removes Chill on this part; applies Shock Tier 1 (addendum cost).

tiers.name: Charred
tiers.description: Stops Poison, clears Infection; Forced Action - Body.

tiers.name: Immolated
tiers.description: Part disabled (book: loss of part of limb) + Shock Tier 3; on torso/head starts a 1-Clock death timer (addendum R4).

tiers.name: Consumed
tiers.description: Burned beyond recovery — lethal on vital parts only (matches burn T3's death_timer_clocks_if_vital). A limb caps at disabled; only a lethal part can be killed by burning (F2 fix — same categorical bug as crushed T4).

name: Poison
description: Typed toxins (neurotoxin/hemotoxin/myotoxin/pneumotoxin/cytotoxin) with entry conditions and activation delays. Different types are incompatible -> Poison Soup (burst capped at part max HP - 1 on vitals, addendum R10).

tiers.name: Disruptive
tiers.description: Debilitating effects; no lethal clock; can be fought through.

tiers.name: Crippling
tiers.description: Disables parts; introduces clocks; requires adaptation.

tiers.name: Catastrophic
tiers.description: Introduces a lethal clock; must be actively delayed or cured.

name: Dissolution
description: Suffocation of the Mind. A 2-Clock timer to mind-collapse (KO/removed-from-play, never engine 'death' — addendum R5). Psychic resistance tiers slow the timer +1 Clock per tier (addendum R6). Requires an explicit source; never from standard attacks.
